title: Maze
description: This mod adds a world that is full of maze.
body:
This mod adds a world that is full of maze.
To get to this world,you need to create a PortalCreator and build a PortalFrame(just like the nether portal) by stonebricks,then rightclick the PortalFrame by the PortalCreator. To get back,just use the PortalCreator or create another Portal.
The recipe of PortalCreator is in the Gallery.
Note:In the maze world,you will get hurt if your PosY>2 .
